demographics.living_situation: lives at home; alone this evening

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My mouth is like sandpaper, I couldn't swallow my dinner, and now my throat is burning intensely. I feel like something is stuck.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly tonight while I was eating dry crackers and I'm frightened something is lodged in my throat — I want to know if I need to go to hospital.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly tonight, while I was eating dry crackers for dinner
symptom_narrative.duration: a couple of hours and still uncomfortable
symptom_narrative.character: a horrible dry, scraping, burning feeling in my throat, like the food got stuck and grated all the way down
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really distressing — my mouth is completely parched and the burning is intense
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high up in my throat and the back of my mouth, not down in my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on all at once with the crackers and has stayed since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sipping small amounts of water helps a tiny bit but doesn't really fix it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: dry food, and it started the moment the crackers hit my dry mouth
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my mouth and eyes have been really dry for about a year; no fever, no swelling of my face, and I can still drink water
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had the dryness for a while but I've never had it grab like this while eating before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I couldn't finish my dinner and I'm anxious and keep sipping water

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Sjögren's — an autoimmune condition that dries out my eyes and mouth; a blood test came back positive for it
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: over the past year or so
past_medical_history.how_managed: I use lubricating eye drops for my dry eyes; nothing regular for my mouth

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: lubricating eye drops for dry eyes

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home on my own tonight, feeling anxious about the throat symptoms

objective_data_offered.value: I can still swallow water okay — I just drank about half a glass in small sips without any trouble or choking
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-report of swallowing tolerance; not observed by a clinician

objective_data_offered.value: I'm not drooling and I can manage my own spit — it's just so dry and burning
I haven't taken my temperature but I don't feel hot or feverish and I haven't had the shakes
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-impression only; no thermometer reading taken

objective_data_offered.value: my face isn't swollen and there's no lump in my cheek or under my jaw that I can see or feel
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-described / on-camera appearance only, not a clinical examination

objective_data_offered.value: my mouth looks really dry and my voice sounds a bit smacky and dry when I talk
